[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010110 4
1 0100001 2
2 0111100 4
3 1010101 4
4 1111000 4
5 1111010 5
6 0100001 2
7 0111100 4

01 10 0001011 3

67 76 1111101 6
70 07 0101110 4

13 31 0100001 2 match 1 6

46 64 1111101 6
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 1111011 6
71 17 0101101 4

50 05 1011111 6
61 16 1111001 5
72 27 1111110 6
